papers.title: Agentic-VLA: Efficient Online Adaptation for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.22896v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation by leveraging pre-trained vision-language representations. However, current VLA training methods suffer from two critical limitations: poor generalization to novel environments and low training efficiency requiring extensive demonstrations. We introduce Agentic-VLA, an agentic training framework that enables VLAs to efficiently adapt online through thr
papers.reason: 提出在线适应机制，解决VLA模型在新环境中的泛化问题。提供可复用的自适应训练策略，适用于LIBERO等基准测试。

papers.title: $\pi_0$-EqM: Equilibrium Matching for Closed-Loop Vision-Language-Action Control
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23128v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Currently, Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have become the most adopted paradigm for robotic manipulation for its great potential for task generalization. While most generative flow-matching action decoders for VLA control are often deployed with fixed sampling horizons, limiting state-dependent compute and temporal reuse across control cycles. We present $\pi_0$-EqM, which replaces the flow-matching expert in $\pi_0$ with an Equilibrium Matchi
papers.reason: 引入平衡匹配（Equilibrium Matching）优化闭环控制稳定性，改进流匹配解码器。为VLA动作生成提供新的稳定训练范式，可直接应用于现有架构。

papers.title: Sparse Compositional Flow Matching by geometric assembly from motion primitives
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23341v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Embodied trajectories, such as the executable motion sequences of robotic manipulators, underwater vehicles, and mobile robots, are a fundamental output of embodied AI. papers.reason: 通过运动基元的几何组装实现稀疏组合流匹配，提升轨迹生成效率。方法新颖但缺乏具体机器人硬件实验验证，暂归为值得了解。

papers.title: Semantically Structured Mixture-of-Experts for Compositional Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23477v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Diffusion-based policies have established a new standard for precise robotic manipulation but face a critical scalability bottleneck: high-performance models are computationally expensive, while lightweight alternatives often fail to generalize across diverse multi-task environments. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures offer a promising path to efficiency by activating only a subset of parameters. However, existing MoE routing mechanisms typical
papers.reason: 利用语义结构的MoE架构解决扩散策略的可扩展性瓶颈。提供轻量化且具备泛化能力的模型结构，适合资源受限场景部署。

papers.title: TactileReflex: Noise-Statistics-Driven Vision-Tactile Reflex Control for Force-Sensitive Manipulation
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23568v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Manipulating fragile deformable containers, such as disposable plastic cups filled with liquid, demands real-time grip-force adaptation within an extremely narrow force margin: insufficient force causes slip, while excessive force irreversibly deforms the thin wall. Existing approaches struggle to achieve such force-sensitive manipulation tasks. We propose a noise-statistics-based calibration-driven reflex control paradigm with vision-based tactile
papers.reason: 针对易碎物体操作，提出基于噪声统计的视触觉反射控制框架。填补触觉VLA在力控精细操作领域的空白，具有明确的应用价值。

papers.title: Instrumentation for Imitation Learning: Enhancing Training Datasets for Clothes Hanger Insertion
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23847v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large behaviour models have transformed the field of robotic manipulation, but prohibitive data requirements have thus far prevented a revolution similar to vision language models. We believe that instrumentation, i.e. sensor integration in objects, can provide invaluable state information and enable efficient learning for robotic manipulation. papers.reason: 探讨通过对象传感器集成增强模仿学习数据集的方法，以衣架插入为例。属于数据工程方向，对VLA数据收集有启发但非核心算法突破。

papers.title: Point Tracking Improves World Action Models
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23856v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Robot policy learning benefits from world-action models that capture environment dynamics, but pixel-level prediction entangles dynamics with nuisance factors such as lighting and texture, making learned representations vulnerable to task-irrelevant visual variation. papers.reason: 引入点跟踪技术解耦动态与视觉干扰，提升世界-动作模型的鲁棒性。为VLA中的状态表示提供低成本改进方案，易于集成到现有pipeline。

papers.title: GEM-4D: Geometry-Enhanced Video World Models for Robot Manipulation
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.22882v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Video world models can generate realistic futures from a single instruction, but they often fail to preserve consistent point-level motion over time. As a result, the generated videos appear plausible, yet lack the physical grounding required for reliable action execution, such as robot manipulation. papers.reason: 结合几何增强的视频世界模型，改善长期预测的物理一致性。虽涉及机器人操作，但侧重世界模型生成质量，对直接动作控制的贡献需进一步验证。

papers.title: SCRIPT: Scalable Diffusion Policy with Multi-stage Training for Language-driven Physics-Based Humanoid Control
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.22894v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Controlling physics-based humanoids from natural-language instructions is a critical step toward general-purpose embodied agents. However, existing methods remain constrained by a tension between semantic expressiveness and physical feasibility, often failing to jointly achieve faithful instruction following, high-quality motion, and stable long-horizon control. We propose SCRIPT, a scalable diffusion policy with a multi-stage training framework
papers.reason: 提出多阶段训练的扩散策略，解决人形机器人语言控制的物理可行性问题。为人形机器人VLA提供可扩展的训练流程，具有较高复用价值。

papers.title: IntentionNav: A Benchmark for Intent-Driven Object Navigation from Implicit Human Instruction
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23187v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing object navigation benchmarks usually tell an embodied agent which object category to find, such as microwave or chair. Human-facing embodied AI is often asked something less direct: "I need something to warm this food" or "the room feels stuffy." papers.reason: 发布意图驱动的对象导航基准，处理隐式人类指令。作为新Benchmark值得关注，但本身不提供新的VLA架构或算法。

papers.title: Lipschitz Optimization for Formal Verification of Homographies
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23203v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The adoption of vision neural networks in regulated industries requires formal robustness guarantees, especially in safety-critical domains such as healthcare, autonomous vehicles, and aerospace. papers.reason: 关注单应性矩阵的形式化验证与Lipschitz优化，属于计算机视觉基础理论与安全领域，无直接机器人操作场景关联。

papers.title: ChainFlow-VLA: Causal Flow Planning with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23270v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Current end-to-end autonomous driving systems are fundamentally limited by a mismatch between temporal causal reasoning and global trajectory consistency. papers.title: GAF: Gaussian Action Field as a 4D Representation for Dynamic World Modeling in Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2506.14135v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Accurate scene perception is critical for vision-based robotic manipulation. Existing approaches typically follow either a Vision-to-Action (V-A) paradigm, predicting actions directly from visual inputs, or a Vision-to-3D-to-Action (V-3D-A) paradigm, leveraging intermediate 3D representations. papers.reason: 提出高斯动作场作为动态世界建模的4D表示。方法创新但偏向表征学习，需更多证据表明其能直接提升端到端VLA策略性能。

papers.title: USIM and U0: A Vision-Language-Action Dataset and Model for General Underwater Robots
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2510.07869v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Underwater environments pose unique challenges for robotic navigation and manipulation. While existing research has primarily focused on task-specific methods, studies on general-purpose intelligence for multi-task execution remain scarce. To address this gap, we propose a unified framework for general-purpose underwater robots that integrates perception and action driven by language instructions. First, we develop a data synthesis pipeline to
papers.reason: 发布水下机器人VLA数据集USIM及模型U0，填补水下操作领域空白。提供稀缺的多模态水下数据，对拓展VLA应用场景具有重要价值。

papers.title: LACY: A Vision-Language Model-based Language-Action Cycle for Self-Improving Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2511.02239v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Learning generalizable policies for robotic manipulation increasingly relies on large-scale models that map language instructions to actions (L2A). However, this one-way paradigm often produces policies that execute tasks without deeper contextual understanding, limiting their ability to generalize or explain their behavior. papers.reason: 构建语言-动作循环以实现自我改进的操作策略。概念有趣但摘要未展示显著优于SOTA的实验结果，暂归为值得了解。

papers.title: V-VLAPS: Value-Guided Planning for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2601.00969v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models provide strong action priors for robotic manipulation, but their reactive behavior can fail under distribution shift and long-horizon task structure. papers.reason: 引入价值引导规划以增强VLA在分布外任务中的长程规划能力。提供即插即用的规划模块，可有效缓解VLA的短视问题。

papers.title: VGAS: Value-Guided Action-Chunk Selection for Few-Shot Vision-Language-Action Adaptation
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2602.07399v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Vision--Language--Action (VLA) models bridge multimodal reasoning with physical control, but adapting them to new tasks with scarce demonstrations remains unreliable. papers.title: ComPose: When to Trust Hands for Object Pose Tracking
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23523v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reconstructing the motion of objects from videos is a key component for embodied AI and robot manipulation. papers.title: VGGT-Segmentor: Geometry-Enhanced Cross-View Segmentation
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2604.13596v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Instance-level object segmentation across disparate egocentric and exocentric views is a fundamental challenge in visual understanding, critical for applications in embodied AI and remote collaboration. papers.reason: 专注于跨视图实例分割的几何增强方法，属纯视觉感知任务，无机器人操作或具身交互环节。

papers.title: Direct Dynamic Retargeting for Humanoid Imitation Learning from Videos

papers.title: Robotic Strawberry Harvesting with Robust Vision and Deep Reinforcement Learning based Sim-to-Real Control
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23863v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This study presents a closed-loop robotic strawberry harvesting system that combines a robust vision module, simulation-trained deep reinforcement learning (DRL) control, and ROS-based realrobot execution. papers.title: How Mobile World Model Guides GUI Agents?
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.10347v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models have enabled mobile GUI agents to perceive visual interfaces and execute user instructions, but reliable prediction of action consequences remains critical for long-horizon and high-risk interactions. papers.title: Diffusion and Flow Matching Models for Tabular Data: A Survey

papers.title: Flow Mismatching: Unsupervised Anomaly Detection via Velocity Discrepancies in Flow Matching Models
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23070v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We propose Flow Mismatching, an unsupervised anomaly detection method that deliberately avoids reconstruction-based paradigms. papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23345v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Interactive world models for first-person shooter (FPS) games must resolve high-frequency overlapping control signals at every frame without disrupting unaffected regions. papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.11596v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Closed-loop driving simulation requires real-time interaction beyond short offline clips, pushing current driving world models toward autoregressive (AR) rollout. papers.title: Next-Latent Prediction Transformers Learn Compact World Models
papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2511.05963v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Transformers replace recurrence with a memory that grows with sequence length and self-attention that enables ad-hoc lookups over past tokens.
